overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a misty mountainous wilderness at dawn. The character traverses rocky terrain, passes through a narrow pass with an abandoned campsite, and follows a river through an open valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail approaching large boulder formation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward a large rock formation in the misty mountains

entered.detail: massive boulder dominating the path ahead with rough grey surface
group of evergreen coniferous trees on the hillside
misty mountain range silhouetted against the bright morning sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open mountain trail with sparse vegetation. A massive rock formation looms ahead while pine trees line the right side. The atmosphere is misty with cool blue tones and sun rays filtering through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky pass with abandoned campsite

events.description: character enters narrow passage between tall rock walls
character discovers a small campsite with orange tent and wooden supply crates

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow rocky pass and passing a small abandoned campsite

entered.detail: tall rock walls forming a narrow corridor through the terrain
orange camping tent with weathered fabric
stacked wooden pallets and supply boxes next to the tent

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a narrow rocky pass between tall stone walls. An abandoned campsite with an orange tent and wooden crates appears on the left. The lighting becomes more diffused and shaded within the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open river valley with wildflower meadows

events.description: character exits rocky pass into open valley with visible river and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: walking along the riverbank through an open misty valley with wildflowers

entered.detail: flowing water running through the valley floor with visible current
clusters of white and pink wildflowers growing along the trail
dense pine forest covering the mountainsides in the background

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the rocky pass into a wide open valley. A river flows on the left while wildflowers dot the right side of the path. The landscape opens up to reveal distant misty mountains and dense pine forests under the morning sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a misty mountain trail through a claustrophobic rocky pass and into a vast, sunlit valley. It begins on an open trail with sparse vegetation and pine trees, where cool blue tones and filtering sun rays illuminate a massive rock formation ahead. As the character advances, the environment tightens into a narrow pass between towering stone walls, shifting the lighting to a diffused shade as the camera passes an abandoned campsite with an orange tent and wooden crates. The scene then opens abruptly as the character emerges from the enclosure into a wide valley, where the path is flanked by a flowing river and colorful wildflowers. Finally, the landscape expands fully to reveal dense pine forests and distant misty mountains under the brightening morning sun.
